'''Zamorakian Mage Pack''' is a other item.

==Item sources==
{{Drop sources list|Zamorakian Mage Pack}}

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
The knapsack of a mage within Dowdun Reach. It contains all the materials that the mage would have needed for a day's work. Now they are yours.
}}
